name: hybrid-loops
description: Hybrid loops — a design pattern where LLM judgment and deterministic code form a mutually-constraining cycle (not a pipeline). Diagnostic skill plus three MCP servers (cal_log, metacog, schemaforge) for the recurring primitives.

plugins.name: hybrid-loops
plugins.description: Design surfaces where LLM judgment and deterministic code alternate as mutually-reinforcing layers — fuzzy lens → typed substrate → deterministic gate → reasoner → action, with calibration and metabolism closing the loop. Diagnostic-first skill plus three MCP servers: cal_log (calibration logger), metacog (cognitive-bias auditor), schemaforge (compress+verify schema discovery).
